response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR registration_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_code
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY FlightOccurrence
PK flight_code, flight_date, status_code, status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_time : time
ATTR baggage_belt_code : varchar

ENTITY BoardingRecord
PK flight_code, flight_date, passenger_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : FK
ATTR seat : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code, flight_date, crew_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR crew_code : varchar : FK

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL FlightOccurrence -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightOccurrence -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL BoardingRecord -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL BoardingRecord -> Passenger : 1 -> 1 : FK=passenger_code
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_code
